## The canonical paradigms to learn rewards {.nav-intro}

::: {.callout-tip title="Definition: Active Preference Learning (APL)"}
APL enables the learner to *actively* select which preference queries to ask the human. The query selection algorithm is sometimes called the *acquisition function*.

[@apl, @easy]{style="font-size: 0.6em;"}.
:::

Acquisition functions are particularly useful to achieve faster convergence to a desired optimum or more efficient learning

::: {.callout-tip title="Definition: Active Preference Learning (APL)"}
APL enables the learner to *actively* select which preference queries to ask the human. The query selection algorithm is sometimes called the *acquisition function*.

[@apl, @easy]{style="font-size: 0.6em;"}.
:::

::: {.callout-tip title="Definition: Active Preference Learning (APL)"}
APL enables the learner to *actively* select which preference queries to ask the human. The query selection algorithm is sometimes called the *acquisition function*.

[@apl, @easy]{style="font-size: 0.6em;"}.
:::
<!-- However, human feedback is **imperfect**.

- Inconsistency, suboptimality, and heterogeneity bias provided feedback.
- Humans are not computers: they have finite energy and are risk-averse.

Even pairwise comparisons, can vary over trials and individuals. [@exopbl]{style="font-size: 0.6em;"} -->
